symptom: Safe operation, cleaning, and removing stuck food (Hamilton Beach toaster manual)

preconditions: Always unplug the toaster when not in use and before cleaning
Allow the toaster to cool before cleaning or moving it
Do not use metal scouring pads — pieces can touch electrical parts
hazards: Fire if crumb tray is not cleaned regularly
Electric shock if water or metal pad fragments contact live parts
Damage to heating elements if fork or sharp tool is inserted in slots

steps.action: Confirm the toaster is unplugged before any cleaning or when finished using it
steps.what_to_look_for: Power plug removed from the outlet; bread lifter in the up position before unplugging per manual
steps.visual_confirmation: Cord plug is in hand or outlet is visibly empty
steps.safety_note: Manual: Before unplugging, ensure bread lifter is up; grasp plug to disconnect, do not pull cord

steps.action: Remove and empty the slide-out crumb tray regularly
steps.what_to_look_for: Crumb tray pulled out from bottom; crumbs emptied into trash
steps.visual_confirmation: Tray is empty or mostly clear of debris
steps.if_issue_found: Failure to clean crumb tray may result in fire hazard (manufacturer warning)

steps.action: To remove food lodged in slots: unplug, allow to cool, then turn toaster upside down and shake gently
steps.what_to_look_for: Loose crumbs or food pieces fall out; user is not using fork or metal while plugged in
steps.visual_confirmation: Slot area is clearer; no tools inserted into slots
steps.if_issue_found: Do not use fork or utensil that could damage heating element or cause fire/shock

steps.action: Wipe exterior with a damp cloth; avoid getting water into slots, levers, or buttons
steps.what_to_look_for: External surfaces wiped; no drips entering slot openings
steps.visual_confirmation: Outside looks clean and dry to the touch

steps.action: Remove dust cover only after unplugging and full cool-down; never use dust cover during operation
steps.what_to_look_for: Dust cover stored away while toaster is running
steps.visual_confirmation: If cover was on, it is off before next use
steps.safety_note: Manual: Fire hazard — remove dust cover during use

sources: Hamilton Beach Use and Care Guide 840231800 (PDF, team materials)
